description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent front porch, flanked by two symmetrical trees and a white picket fence enclosing the front yard. The exterior is primarily light-colored, with a combination of siding and large windows, and a wooden garage door on one side. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a patio, a small pool, and landscaped greenery, including flowering trees and shrubs. The roof is a simple gable style, and the property is bordered by a mix of white and dark fencing. The driveway and walkway are paved, leading up to the main entrance and garage. The overall design blends traditional bungalow elements with modern touches, such as expansive glass panels at the back.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, white picket fence, and landscaped yards, featuring both traditional and modern design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical trees, white picket fence, and driveway leading to a wooden garage door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garage, and the transition from the front yard to the backyard with visible fencing and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large glass windows, a patio area, a small pool, and landscaped backyard with flowering trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, additional windows, and the connection between the backyard and front yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with large grouped windows at the rear
